title: centaurea × hodliana
intro: Centaurea × hodliana, a hybrid of the centaurea genus, is a flowering plant known for its vibrant purple or pink blooms and medicinal properties. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × hodliana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat wounds, fever, and other ailments.
